parameters.formDescription: Submit a training request. This form will create a draft course brief for instructional-design review.

assignments.name: openai_prompt
assignments.value: =You are an expert instructional designer using the ADDIE model.  Create a practical course design brief from the training request below.  Training topic: {{$json["Training Topic"]}} Business problem: {{$json["Business Problem"]}} Target audience: {{$json["Target Audience"]}} Audience size: {{$json["Audience Size"]}} Preferred delivery format: {{$json["Delivery Format"]}} Deadline: {{$json["Deadline"]}} Source material: {{$json["Source Material"]}} SME name: {{$json["SME Name"]}} SME email: {{$json["SME Email"]}} Compliance requirement: {{$json["Compliance Requirement"]}} Preferred tone: {{$json["Preferred Tone"]}}  Return the brief using these headings:  1. Training need summary 2. Performance problem 3. Target audience 4. 3-5 measurable learning objectives 5. Recommended course format 6. Proposed course outline with estimated timing 7. Suggested scenario-based practice 8. Assessment approach 9. Missing information 10. Human review notes  Important rules: - Do not invent facts. - If information is missing, say so under Missing information. - Use measurable action verbs. - Keep the output practical and concise. - AI is only assisting. Human instructional-design review is still required.

parameters.subject: =Review needed: AI course brief - {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}
parameters.message:
=

Hello {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["SME Name"]}},

A new AI-assisted course design brief has been created for review.

Training topic: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}

Requester: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Requester Name"]}} ({{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Requester Email"]}})

Department: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Department"]}}

Target audience: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Target Audience"]}}

Please review the draft brief here:

Open AI Course Design Brief

Please check:

  • whether the learning objectives are measurable,
  • whether the course outline matches the training need,
  • whether any facts, process details, or compliance points need correction,
  • whether anything should be revised before course development starts.

Important: This draft was generated with AI and must be reviewed by a human instructional designer or SME before use.

Regards,
Akinwale

parameters.subject: =Course brief approved: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}
parameters.message:
=

Hello {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Requester Name"]}},

The AI-assisted course design brief for your training request has been reviewed and approved.

Training topic: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}

Status: Approved

You can view the approved course brief here:

Open approved course brief

The brief is now ready to move into course development.

Regards,
Akinwale

parameters.subject: =Course brief rejected: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}
parameters.message:
=

Hello {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Requester Name"]}},

The AI-assisted course design brief for your training request has been reviewed and was not approved.

Training topic: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}

Status: Rejected

Reviewer feedback:

{{$json["data"]["Reviewer Feedback"]}}

You can view the reviewed draft here:

Open rejected course brief

This request will not move into course development unless a new or revised request is submitted.

Regards,
Akinwale

assignments.name: revision_prompt
assignments.value: =You are an expert instructional designer using the ADDIE model.  A reviewer has requested revisions to an AI-generated course design brief.  Your task: Revise the course design brief using the reviewer feedback below.  Original training request:  Training topic: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}  Business problem: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Business Problem"]}}  Target audience: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Target Audience"]}}  Preferred delivery format: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Delivery Format"]}}  Compliance requirement: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Compliance Requirement"]}}  Preferred tone: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Preferred Tone"]}}  Original AI-generated draft brief: {{$node["Extract AI Draft"].json["ai_draft"]}}  Reviewer decision: {{$json["data"]["Reviewer Decision"]}}  Reviewer feedback: {{$json["data"]["Reviewer Feedback"]}}  Revision instructions: - Apply the reviewer feedback carefully. - Do not invent facts. - Keep the brief practical and concise. - Keep measurable learning objectives. - If information is still missing, list it clearly under Missing information. - Keep a human-review note at the end. - Return the revised course brief using the same 10 headings as the original brief.

actionFields.text: =------------------------------------------------------------  REVISED AI-GENERATED COURSE BRIEF  Revision reason: {{$node["Send Review Request"].json["data"]["Reviewer Feedback"]}}  {{$node["Extract Revised Draft"].json["revised_ai_draft"]}}  ------------------------------------------------------------  SECOND HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED  This revised draft was generated using reviewer feedback. It must still be reviewed before course development continues.

parameters.subject: =Revised course brief ready for review: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}
parameters.message:
=

Hello {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["SME Name"]}},

The course design brief has been revised based on your feedback.

Training topic: {{$node["Training Request Form"].json["Training Topic"]}}

Previous feedback:

{{$node["Send Review Request"].json["data"]["Reviewer Feedback"]}}

You can review the updated brief here:

Open revised course brief

Please review the revised section before the brief is approved for course development.

Reminder: AI-assisted content must still be reviewed by a human instructional designer or SME before use.

Regards,
Akinwale
